description: Bolsas y Mercados Argentinos S.A. operates as a stock exchange in Argentina. It offers investment access to organizations, companies, and the general public. The company provides primary placement, secondary negotiation, settlement, and delivery and payment of the traded securities; and the register of shareholders, safekeeping, and debt payment and allocation activities. It also offers brokers ranking, trading, transaction, clearing and settlement, and safekeeping and related services, as well as services for broker-dealer members. The company was founded in 2013 and is based in Buenos Aires, Argentina.
